# foh-links-menu

Front-of-house quick-links menu with operator-editable settings

*Auto-generated by update-claude-docs.py on 2026-07-01. Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten.*

## Architecture
- **Type:** GAS spreadsheet add-on (onOpen menu)
- **Code style:** Uses `var` and function() style — match this, not const/let
- **GS files (4):** 01_Menu_and_Setup.gs, 02_Link_Functions.gs, 03_Weekly_Reset.gs, 04_Settings.gs
- **HTML files (2):** DonationDialog.html, Sidebar.html

## Sheet Tabs (3)
- `DonationLog`
- `Links`
- `Settings`

## Key Patterns
- Spreadsheet add-on (onOpen menu)
- Programmatic triggers
- Trigger cleanup utility
- Email delivery
- PropertiesService for config/caching
- Idempotent setup function
- Numbered file convention (01_, 02_, etc.)

## Functions (24 total)
